homeDescription: This starter surface confirms i18n wiring with locale-neutral routing.

home.title: Arcane Codex foundation reference routes
home.description: Use the split surfaces to review dense workbench workflows and editorial codex presentation.

sandbox.title: UI Sandbox
sandbox.description: Dev-only route for visual QA of primitives and domain components.
sandbox.patternsDescription: Use workbench and codex routes for full pattern and state-completeness checks.

switcher.title: Live theme switchers
switcher.description: Switch the full sandbox between color palettes and font stacks to evaluate the direction in-context.

palette.title: Palette comparison (2A-2E)
palette.description: Side-by-side token previews for the five baseline color directions in visual baseline v1.
palette.previewBody: Buttons, badges, and alert states rendered against the local token override.

2A.name: Parchment + Oxblood + Brass
2A.description: Strong codex identity with warm parchment depth and high thematic signal.

2B.name: Cool Arcane Ledger
2B.description: Cooler slate-heavy direction with restrained fantasy warmth.

2C.name: Ranger Archive
2C.description: Earthy green-brown mix that feels grounded and field-journal oriented.

2D.name: Noble Chronicle
2D.description: Regal blue-gold ledger tone with cleaner modern contrast.

2E.name: High-Contrast Utility Codex
2E.description: Readability-first variant with quieter personality and stronger utility contrast.

workbench.title: Arcane Codex · Workbench
workbench.subtitle: Dense planning surface for active character editing.
workbench.abilitySubtitle: Compact score blocks and save table tuned for fast scanning.

codex.title: Arcane Codex · Codex
codex.subtitle: Editorial reading surface with restrained ornament.
codex.abilitySubtitle: Codex presentation keeps stat meaning while using calmer pacing.
codex.editorialIntro: The codex surface preserves mechanics clarity while allowing a stronger editorial parchment tone for reading-oriented contexts.

shell.drawerDescription: Reference drawer state for primitive behavior.
shell.dialogDescription: Reference dialog state for primitive behavior.

sections.stateCoverageSubtitle: Loading, empty, validation, and recoverable error states are explicitly represented.

states.emptyMessage: No records are available for this section.
states.validationMessage: Input failed schema checks and should surface structured guidance.
states.recoverableErrorMessage: The operation could not complete; retry is available.

validation.routeBoundaryMessage: The route received invalid view-model data and cannot safely render the primary patterns.
validation.routeBoundaryHint: Check route-level data mapping before rendering pattern components.
validation.patternMessage: The pattern rejected invalid data and rendered a safe fallback.
